commands.name: accessibility

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --shape-names
options.description:
Comma-separated shape names in desired reading order
(required for: set-reading-order)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description:
1-based slide index (required for: get-reading-order,
set-reading-order)

commands.description:
Accessibility audit: check alt text, title placeholders, 
reading order.

commands.name: animation

options.name: --delay
options.description:
Delay before start in seconds (required for:
set-timing)

options.name: --duration
options.description: Duration in seconds (required for: set-timing)

options.name: --effect-index
options.description:
1-based index of the effect in the animation sequence
(required for: remove, set-timing, reorder)

options.name: --effect-type
options.description:
MsoAnimEffect integer (e.g., 1=Appear, 2=Fly, 10=Fade,
16=Wipe) (required for: add)

options.name: --new-index
options.description:
1-based target position in the sequence (required for:
reorder)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --shape-name
options.description: Name of the target shape (required for: add)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required)

options.name: --trigger-type
options.description:
1=OnClick (default), 2=WithPrevious, 3=AfterPrevious
(required for: add, set-timing)

commands.description:
Animation effect operations: list, add, remove, reorder 
effects on slides.

commands.name: background

options.name: --color-hex
options.description: Hex color string (#RRGGBB) (required for: set-color)

options.name: --color1
options.description:
First gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for:
set-gradient)

options.name: --color2
options.description:
Second gradient color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for:
set-gradient)

options.name: --gradient-style
options.description:
1=Horizontal, 2=Vertical, 3=DiagonalUp,
4=DiagonalDown, 5=FromCorner, 6=FromCenter (required for: set-gradient)

options.name: --image-path
options.description: Path to the image file (required for: set-image)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required)

commands.description:
Slide background: get, set solid color, set image, reset 
to master.

commands.name: batch

options.name: --input
options.description:
JSON file with command array. Use '-' for
stdin (NDJSON, one command per line). If omitted, reads from stdin.

options.name: --session
options.description:
Default session ID for all commands. Overridden by
per-command sessionId. Auto-captured from session.open/create if not set.

options.name: --stop-on-error
options.description:
Stop execution on first error (default: continue all
commands).

commands.description:
Execute multiple commands from a JSON file or stdin. 
Outputs NDJSON (one result per line).

commands.name: chart

options.name: --axis-type
options.description:
Axis type: 1=Category(X), 2=Value(Y) (required for:
set-axis-title)

options.name: --chart-type
options.description:
XlChartType integer (e.g., 4=xlLine, 5=xlPie,
51=xlColumnClustered, -4169=xl3DColumn) (required for: create, set-type)

options.name: --height
options.description: Height in points (required for: create)

options.name: --left
options.description: Position from left in points (required for: create)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --position
options.description:
Legend position: -4107=Bottom, -4131=Left,
-4152=Right, -4160=Top, -4161=TopRight (required for: set-legend)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --shape-name
options.description:
Name of the chart shape (required for: get-info,
set-title, set-type, delete, set-data, set-legend, read-data, set-axis-title,
toggle-data-table)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required)

options.name: --title
options.description:
Title text for the axis (required for: set-title,
set-axis-title)

options.name: --top
options.description: Position from top in points (required for: create)

options.name: --values
options.description:
2D array of values (rows × columns) (required
for: set-data) (JSON format)

options.name: --visible
options.description:
Whether the legend is visible (required for:
set-legend, toggle-data-table)

options.name: --width
options.description: Width in points (required for: create)

commands.description:
Embedded chart operations: create, get info, set title, 
set type, delete.

options.name: --author
options.description: Author name (required for: add)

options.name: --comment-index

options.name: --left

Horizontal position in points (0 = top-left) (required
for: add)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --slide-index

options.name: --text

options.name: --top

Vertical position in points (0 = top-left) (required
for: add)

commands.description: Slide comments: list, add, delete.

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --show-name
options.description:
Name for the custom show (required for: create,
delete)

options.name: --slide-indices
options.description:
Comma-separated 1-based slide indices (e.g.
"1,3,5") (required for: create)

commands.name: design

options.name: --archetype-id
options.description:
Archetype id: big-number, kpi-card-dashboard,
operational-kpi, column-bar-chart, chart-insight-callout, framework,
simple-table, waterfall-chart, comparison, timeline-roadmap, process-diagram,
executive-summary, recommendations, quote, map, appendix, annotated-diagram,
chart-and-commentary, org-chart, title-slide (required for: get-archetype)

options.name: --density-id
options.description:
Density id: D1, D2, D3, D4, D5 (required for:
get-density-profile)

options.name: --design-index
options.description:
1-based design index (0 = first design) (required for:
get-colors, get-fonts)

options.name: --grid-id
options.description:
Grid id: single-column, two-column-equal,
two-column-60-40, three-column, four-column, grid-2x2, grid-3x2, big-number,
kpi-3-cards, kpi-4-cards, kpi-5-cards, chart-full, chart-callout, timeline,
process-3-step, section-divider, title-dark-hero (required for:
get-layout-grid)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --palette-id
options.description:
Palette id: corporate-blue, slate-professional,
modern-tech, confident-bold, warm-coral, academic-neutral, nature-calm,
electric-minimal (required for: get-palette)

options.name: --profile-id
options.description:
Profile id: consulting, corporate, sales, startup,
keynote, educational, academic, creative (required for: get-style-profile)

options.name: --sequence-id
options.description:
Sequence id: S1 (Decision), S2 (Performance Review),
S3 (Pitch/Proposal), S4 (Transformation), S5 (Regulatory) (required for:
get-deck-sequence)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --theme-path
options.description:
Full path to .thmx theme file (required for:
apply-theme)

commands.description:
Design operations: themes, colors, fonts, and design 
knowledge catalog. THEME OPERATIONS (require open presentation): - list, 
apply-theme, get-colors, list-color-schemes, get-fonts DESIGN KNOWLEDGE CATALOG 
(query on demand): - list-archetypes / get-archetype: primary unified archetype 
surface with curated rules plus learned subtype/example coverage when local 
reference data is available - list-palettes / get-palette: 8 color palettes with
hex values - list-style-profiles / get-style-profile: consulting/sales/startup 
configurations - list-layout-grids / get-layout-grid: exact x/y/w/h positioning 
coordinates - list-density-profiles / get-density-profile: D1-D5 content density
rules - get-context-model: meeting type → audience → density mapping -
get-deck-sequence: canonical slide sequences (decision, pitch, review) - 
get-slide-patterns: advanced consulting layout patterns - get-icon-shapes: 
native shape icon catalog

commands.name: export

options.name: --copies
options.description: Number of copies (default: 1) (required for: print)

options.description:
Seconds per slide (default: 5) (required for:
to-video)

options.name: --destination-directory
options.description:
Directory to save images (required for:
all-slides-to-images, extract-images)

options.name: --destination-path
options.description:
Output PDF file path (required for: to-pdf,
slide-to-image, to-video, save-as, extract-text, save-copy)

options.name: --format
options.description: Format code (1-7) (required for: save-as)

options.description:
First slide to print (0 = from beginning) (required
for: print)

Image height in pixels (default: 1080) (required for:
slide-to-image, all-slides-to-images)

Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.description: 1=1080p, 2=720p, 3=480p (required for: to-video)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required for: slide-to-image)

options.name: --to-slide
options.description:
Last slide to print (0 = to end) (required for:
print)

options.name: --width
options.description:
Image width in pixels (default: 1920) (required for:
slide-to-image, all-slides-to-images)

commands.description: Export presentations to PDF, images, or other formats.

options.name: --height
options.description:
Height in points (required for: add-textbox,
add-shape)

options.name: --hyperlink-address
options.description:
URL for actionType=7 (Hyperlink), ignored for other
types

options.name: --left
options.description:
Position from left in points (required for:
add-textbox, add-shape, add-text-effect)

options.name: --line-width
options.description:
Line width in points (default 0.75) (required for:
set-line)

options.name: --locked
options.description:
True to lock aspect ratio, false to unlock (required
for: lock-aspect-ratio)

options.name: --margin-bottom
options.description: Bottom margin in points (null = don't change)

options.name: --margin-left
options.description: Left margin in points (null = don't change)

options.name: --margin-right
options.description: Right margin in points (null = don't change)

options.name: --margin-top
options.description: Top margin in points (null = don't change)

options.name: --merge-type
options.description:
1=Union, 2=Combine, 3=Fragment, 4=Intersect,
5=Subtract (required for: merge)

options.name: --offset-x
options.description: Shadow offset X in points (required for: set-shadow)

options.name: --offset-y
options.description: Shadow offset Y in points (required for: set-shadow)

options.name: --opacity
options.description:
Opacity value from 0.0 (fully transparent) to 1.0
(fully opaque) (required for: set-opacity)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --preset-effect
options.description:
MsoPresetTextEffect integer (0-based preset index)
(required for: add-text-effect)

options.name: --radius
options.description:
Glow radius in points (0 = remove glow) (required for:
set-glow, set-soft-edge)

options.name: --reflection-type
options.description:
0=None, 1-9=msoReflectionType1 through
msoReflectionType9 (required for: set-reflection)

options.name: --rotation-x
options.description:
X-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't
change)

options.name: --rotation-y
options.description:
Y-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't
change)

options.name: --rotation-z
options.description:
Z-axis rotation in degrees (null = don't
change)

options.name: --scale-x
options.description:
Width scale factor (e.g. 1.5 = 150%) (required for:
scale)

options.name: --scale-y
options.description:
Height scale factor (e.g. 1.5 = 150%) (required for:
scale)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --shape-name
options.description:
Name of the shape (required for: read, move-resize,
delete, z-order, set-fill, set-line, set-rotation, ungroup, set-alt-text,
copy-to-slide, set-shadow, duplicate, flip, set-text-frame, set-gradient-fill,
set-glow, set-reflection, set-opacity, read-fill, read-line,
set-action-settings, scale, lock-aspect-ratio, set-soft-edge, read-shadow,
set-3d)

options.name: --shape-names
options.description:
Comma-separated list of shape names to group (required
for: group, merge)

options.name: --shape-type
options.description:
MsoShapeType integer (1=AutoShape, 6=Group,
13=Picture, 14=Placeholder, 17=TextBox, etc.) (required for: find-by-type)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required)

options.name: --source-shape-name
options.description:
Name of the shape to copy formatting from (required
for: copy-formatting)

options.name: --start-shape-name
options.description: Starting shape name (required for: add-connector)

options.name: --target-shape-name
options.description:
Name of the shape to apply formatting to (required
for: copy-formatting)

options.name: --target-slide-index
options.description:
1-based target slide index (required for:
copy-to-slide)

options.name: --text
options.description:
Initial text content (required for: add-textbox,
add-text-effect)

options.name: --top
options.description:
Position from top in points (required for:
add-textbox, add-shape, add-text-effect)

options.name: --visible
options.description: Show or hide shadow (required for: set-shadow)

options.name: --width
options.description:
Width in points (required for: add-textbox,
add-shape)

options.name: --word-wrap
options.description: Enable/disable word wrap (null = don't change)

options.name: --z-order-cmd
options.description:
1=BringToFront, 2=SendToBack, 3=BringForward,
4=SendBackward (required for: z-order)

commands.description:
Shape management: list, read, create, move, resize, 
delete, z-order.

options.name: --align-type

distribute)

commands.name: slide

options.name: --count

Number of clones to create (required for:
clone-with-replace)

options.name: --destination-path
options.description:
Full path for the output PNG file (required for:
get-thumbnail)

options.name: --display
options.description:
Whether to display master shapes (required for:
set-display-master)

options.name: --layout-name
options.description:
Layout name from the slide master (e.g. "Title
Slide", "Blank") (required for: create, apply-layout)

options.name: --name
options.description: New name for the slide (required for: set-name)

options.name: --new-position
options.description: 1-based target position (required for: move)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --position
options.description:
1-based insert position (0 = at end) (required for:
create)

options.name: --replace-text
options.description:
Text to replace with in each clone (required for:
clone-with-replace)

options.name: --search-text
options.description:
Text to search for in each clone (required for:
clone-with-replace)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --slide-index
options.description:
1-based slide index (required for: read, duplicate,
move, delete, apply-layout, set-name, clone-with-replace, hide, unhide,
get-thumbnail, set-display-master, copy)

commands.description:
Slide lifecycle commands: list, read, create, duplicate, 
move, delete.

commands.name: slideimport

options.name: --insert-at
options.description: Position to insert (0 = at end) (required)

options.name: --output

Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

= all) (required)

commands.name: slideshow

options.name: --loop-until-stopped
options.description:
Whether to loop the slideshow continuously (required
for: configure)

options.name: --output
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --show-type
options.description:
1=Speaker (full screen), 2=Browsed by individual
(window), 3=Browsed at kiosk (loop) (required for: configure)

options.name: --show-with-animation
options.description:
Whether to show animations during the slideshow
(required for: configure)

options.name: --show-with-narration
options.description:
Whether to play narrations during the slideshow
(required for: configure)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description:
1-based target slide index (required for:
goto-slide)

options.name: --start-slide
options.description:
1-based slide to start from (0 = beginning) (required
for: start)

commands.description:
Slideshow presentation mode: start, stop, navigate, get 
status.

commands.name: slidetable

options.name: --color-hex

Border color as hex (#RRGGBB) (required for:

options.description:

delete-column, read-cell, format-cell, set-cell-border)

options.name: --columns
options.description: Number of columns (required for: create)

options.name: --end-column
options.description: 1-based end column (required for: merge-cells)

options.name: --end-row
options.description: 1-based end row (required for: merge-cells)

options.name: --fill-color
options.description: Hex fill color (#RRGGBB) or null to skip

options.name: --font-bold
options.description: Set bold (null = don't change)

options.name: --font-size
options.description:
Set font size (0 = don't change) (required for:
format-cell)

options.name: --height
options.description: Height in points (required for: create)

options.name: --left
options.description: Position from left in points (required for: create)

options.name: --output

Write output to file instead of stdout. For image
results, decodes and saves as binary file.

options.name: --position
options.description:
1-based position to insert (-1 = at end) (required
for: add-row, add-column)

options.name: --row
options.description:
1-based row index (required for: write-cell,
delete-row, read-cell, format-cell, write-row, read-row, set-cell-border)

options.name: --rows
options.description: Number of rows (required for: create)

options.name: --session
options.description: Session ID from 'session open' command

options.name: --shape-name
options.description:
Name of the table shape (required for: read,
write-cell, add-row, add-column, delete-row, delete-column, merge-cells,
read-cell, format-cell, write-row, read-row, set-cell-border)

options.name: --slide-index
options.description: 1-based slide index (required)

options.name: --start-column
options.description: 1-based start column (required for: merge-cells)

options.name: --start-row
options.description: 1-based start row (required for: merge-cells)

options.name: --text-align
options.description:
Text alignment: left, center, right (null = don't
change)

options.name: --top
options.description: Position from top in points (required for: create)

options.name: --value
options.description: Cell value to set (required for: write-cell)

options.name: --values
options.description:
Comma-separated values for the row (required for:
write-row)

options.name: --width
options.description:
Width in points (required for: create,
set-cell-border)

Table shape operations: create, read, write cells, 
add/delete rows and columns, merge cells.
